description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H

The subject becomes shaken, and is caught in a zone of absolute darkness that radiates 50 ft away from it. Darkvision cannot pierce the darkness, and the subject can only see creatures it comes into direct contact with. Only the subject can 'see' the darkness. If the subject controls any clones, the clones are also affected by the darkness. Blind creatures are immune to this technique's effects.

Every time the subject is damaged, you must make a Will save (DC 10 + damage done) to prevent the technique being dispelled. After the target is damaged four times, the technique dispels automatically. This technique can be dispelled.
